title: Garlic Glazed Uruguayan Beef Empanadas
description: Tender and indulgent Uruguayan empanadas filled with spicy beef and topped with a rich garlic glaze, perfect for a satisfying snack or meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the rendered fat over medium high heat.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion, garlic, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Roll out the empanada dough and cut out circles of dough.
Place a spoonful of the beef mixture onto the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the filling and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush the tops with the garlic glaze.
Bake the empanadas in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
